runners.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2.75 lengths at Healesville over 300m (16.97) beating Jumbuk Jade in T3 RSTW on April 10. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 400m at this track beaten 11 lengths (23.41) behind Dr. Zaiden in a Mix 6/7 on April 7. Has clocked a slick 22.7 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

runners.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but the start prior went down fighting when second (22.80) over 400m at Geelong. Draws an inside box and capable of a better result.

runners.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (23.91) over 410m at Horsham. Awkward draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

runners.formComment: Returns from a ten weeks break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed over 435m at Sale. Forget the latest effort. Among the chances.
